  "findings": [
    "Shaft alignment was completed before final piping connections were made, violating pipe strain verification protocols."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Loosen piping flanges and perform pipe strain measurement using dial indicators or laser alignment system.",
    "Re-align the shaft after piping is connected to ensure pipe strain does not exceed allowable limits."
  ],
  "rationale": "According to API 686 Chapter 6, final shaft alignment must be verified after piping is connected to ensure that pipe strain does not distort the equipment casing or alter the alignment beyond acceptable tolerances.",

  ]
